title: Spicy Nduja Turnovers
description: A twist on traditional turnovers, these spicy nduja pastries are a perfect combination of spicy and savory.
instructions: Roll out the pastry dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Mix the nduja, mozzarella, parsley, red pepper flakes, and salt in a bowl.
Place a tablespoon of the nduja mixture in the center of each dough circle.
Brush the edges of the dough with the beaten egg.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a triangle or a square shape, pressing the edges to seal.
Place the turnovers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops of the turnovers with the remaining egg.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
